entry.title: [EU/CA][Web Hosting] - Internal DNS Database Service Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 18, 08:00 UTC  -  May 20, 15:00 UTC

Apr 20, 13:01 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Database offer.

Start time : 18/05/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will upgrade the internal DNS supporting our database services.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Clusters 102/103/106/107/110/111/114/120/121/126/127/130 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 4, 05:00 UTC  -  May 7, 21:59 UTC

Apr 16, 18:58 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 04/05/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 07/05/2026 21:59 UTC

List of concerned Filerz:
- Filerz1048 Cluster 130 / 04/05/2026 07:00 UTC
- Filerz169 Cluster 126 / 04/05/2026 07:30 UTC
- Filerz287 Cluster 127 / 04/05/2026 08:00 UTC
- Filerz347 Cluster 107 / 04/05/2026 08:30 UTC
- Filerz178 Cluster 126 / 04/05/2026 22:00 UTC
- Filerz44 Cluster 121 / 04/05/2026 22:30 UTC
- Filerz478 Cluster 102 / 04/05/2026 23:00 UTC
- Filerz51 Cluster 120 / 04/05/2026 23:30 UTC
- Filerz188 Cluster 126 / 05/05/2026 07:00 UTC
- Filerz512 Cluster 111 / 05/05/2026 07:30 UTC
- Filerz580 Cluster 114 / 05/05/2026 08:00 UTC
- Filerz638 Cluster 110 / 05/05/2026 08:30 UTC
- Filerz196 Cluster 126 / 05/05/2026 22:00 UTC
- Filerz535 Cluster 111 / 05/05/2026 22:30 UTC
- Filerz644 Cluster 110 / 05/05/2026 23:00 UTC
- Filerz728 Cluster 106 / 05/05/2026 23:30 UTC
- Filerz201 Cluster 126 / 06/05/2026 07:00 UTC
- Filerz538 Cluster 111 / 06/05/2026 07:30 UTC
- Filerz661 Cluster 110 / 06/05/2026 08:00 UTC
- Filerz873 Cluster 103 / 06/05/2026 08:30 UTC
- Filerz212 Cluster 126 / 07/05/2026 07:00 UTC
- Filerz541 Cluster 111 / 07/05/2026 07:30 UTC
- Filerz876 Cluster 103 / 07/05/2026 08:30 UTC
- Filerz548 Cluster 111 / 07/05/2026 22:00 UTC
- Filerz667 Cluster 110 / 07/05/2026 22:30 UTC
- Filerz878 Cluster 103 / 07/05/2026 23:00 UTC

Service impact : We will be migrating the various Filerz servers to keep our infrastructure up to date and more stable, thereby preventing further service interruptions. The Filerz servers will be unavailable for 30 minutes on the scheduled migration date.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on the web hosting infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - Exchange Hosted incident notification
entry.content:
Apr 24, 13:20 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions has been resolved.

Start time : 24/04/2026 10:45 UTC
End time : 24/04/2026 13:18 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 24, 12:18 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering, which is causing temporary availability issue.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 24/04/2026 10:45 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Exchange Hosted service is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customer have disconnection of heavy client.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Web Hosting] - Domain name Incident Notification
entry.content:
Apr 23, 13:22 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting has been resolved.

Start time : 23/04/2026 10:57 UTC
End time : 23/04/2026 13:13 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 23, 12:20 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary latency issue in Domain name delivery.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 23/04/2026 10:57 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Domain name delivery latency.
Customers Impact : Customers may experience delays in receiving their orders after purchasing a domain.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster20 - Filerz40 incident notification
entry.content:
Apr 23, 00:01 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offer on Cluster120 - Filerz40 has been resolved.

Start time : 22/04/2026 22:31 UTC
End time : 22/04/2026 23:28 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 22, 22:51 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offer on the specific Cluster20 - Filerz40.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 22/04/2026 22:31 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : File server 40 is unreachable on Web Hosting cluster 120.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites located in Filerz40.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [Global][Domains] - incident notification on .MX domains name
entry.content:
Apr 22, 17:11 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Domains has been resolved.

Start time : 13/04/2026 08:30 UTC
End time : 22/04/2026 17:08 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying domain malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 13, 08:43 UTC
Identified - We have determined the origin of the incident affecting our Domains, customers in the impacted zone are unable to perform some tasks.

Here is detail for this incident :
Start time : 13/04/2026 08:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete) are temporarily unavailable for .MX domains.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to perform multiple operations (Registration, Renew, Transfer, Restore, Delete).
Please note that websites are still available.
Unfortunately, customers who want to renew their .MX domains name after the expiration date is already passed will have their websites unavailable.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by our provider.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

Our teams are fully engaged and working to resolve the issue as quickly as possible. We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][CDN] - CDN Infrastructure incident notification
entry.content:
Apr 20, 14:10 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on CDN Infrastructure offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 20/04/2026 13:05 UTC
End time : 20/04/2026 13:36 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : CDN Infrastructure was temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers received 520 and 502 errors when trying to access and use our CDN Infrastructure.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Multiple filerz/server maintenance notification
entry.content:
Apr 17, 12:50 UTC
Completed - The current maintenance has been canceled and she will be rescheduled later.

Thank you for your understanding.

Apr 8, 13:57 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 20/04/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 23/04/2026 23:00 UTC
Service impact : Concerned filerz/server will be temporarily unavailable for 30 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing an update for the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

List of concerned Filerz:

- filerz804 Cluster129 : 20/04/2026 08:00 UTC
- filerz93 Cluster123 : 20/04/2026 08:30 UTC

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Web Hosting] - Hosting order Incident Notification
entry.content:
Apr 13, 16:22 UTC

Start time : 13/04/2026 09:30 UTC
End time : 13/04/2026 14:20 UTC
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 13, 15:36 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offer.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 13/04/2026 09:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their purchases on Web Hosting.
Customers Impact : Customers who made orders between 09:30 UTC and 15:20 UTC are experiencing their orders being stuck in a blocked state.
Orders made outside of this time window are fully operational.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a software issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 8, 02:50 UTC
Update - Filerz152 Cluster126 has been successfully migrated

Apr 7, 20:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 7, 20:00 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer.

Start time : 07/04/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 09/04/2026 23:00 UTC

List of concerned Filerz:
- Filerz 152 Clusters 126 / 07/04/2026 20:00 UTC
- Filerz 167 Clusters 126 / 08/04/2026 20:00 UTC
- Filerz 1812 Clusters 131 / 09/04/2026 20:00 UTC

Service impact : We will be migrating the various Filerz servers to keep our infrastructure up to date and more stable, thereby preventing further service interruptions. The Filerz servers will be unavailable for 30 minutes on the scheduled migration date.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be performing maintenance on the web hosting infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.
